ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce (LockBit-Black / Conti-V3 derived) pre-encryption sabotage burst — service stop + shadow delete + recovery disable within 10 min
ucs.description: Detects the deterministic pre-encryption playbook embedded in the DragonForce encryptor (Group-IB attribution: Conti V3 source-leak fork; Microsoft's late-2024 reporting links DragonForce deployments to Octo Tempest / Scattered Spider affiliates). The leaked builder hard-codes a service-kill list (Veeam, MSSQL, Acronis, Defender, SentinelOne, Sophos, CSAgent) and chains it with vssadmin/wmic shadowcopy deletion and bcdedit/wbadmin recovery sabotage before launching the file-encryption thread. Correlating all three sub-behaviours on one host inside a 10-minute window is highly specific to LockB
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) AS firstTime max(_time) AS lastTime values(Processes.user) AS user values(Processes.process_name) AS proc_names values(Processes.process) AS commands values(Processes.parent_process_name) AS parents FROM datamodel=Endpoint.Processes WHERE Processes.user!="*$" AND Processes.user!="SYSTEM" AND Processes.user!="LOCAL SERVICE" AND Processes.user!="NETWORK SERVICE" AND ( (Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*Veeam*" OR Processes.process="*MSSQL*" OR Processes.process="*SQL*" OR Processes.process="*Backup*" OR Processes.process="*Acronis*" OR Processes.process="*WinDefend*" OR Processes.process="*Sense*" OR Processes.process="*Sophos*" OR Processes.process="*McAfee*" OR Processes.process="*SentinelAgent*" OR Processes.process="*CSFalcon*" OR Processes.process="*CSAgent*")) OR (Processes.process_name="taskkill.exe" AND (Processes.process="*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*sqlservr*" OR Processes.process="*sqlwriter*" OR Processes.process="*sqlagent*" OR Processes.process="*MsMpEng*" OR Processes.process="*MsSense*" OR Processes.process="*windefend*" OR Processes.process="*sophos*" OR Processes.process="*sentinel*" OR Processes.process="*csfalcon*")) OR ((Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Processes.process_name="pwsh.exe") AND Processes.process="*Stop-Service*" AND (Processes.process="*Veeam*" OR Processes.process="*SQL*" OR Processes.process="*Backup*" OR Processes.process="*Sense*" OR Processes.process="*WinDefend*" OR Processes.process="*Sophos*")) OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND Processes.process="*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR ((Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Processes.process_name="pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Win32_Shadowcopy*" OR Processes.process="*Remove-WmiObject*Win32_Shadow*")) OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND ((Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*" AND Processes.process="*No*") OR Processes.process="*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND (Processes.process="*catalog*" OR Processes.process="*systemstatebackup*" OR Processes.process="*backup*")) ) BY Processes.dest _time span=10m | rename Processes.dest AS dest | eval has_svc_stop=if(match(mvjoin(commands,"|"), "(?i)(net|net1|sc|taskkill|Stop-Service).*(Veeam|MSSQL|SQL|Backup|Acronis|WinDefend|Sense|Sophos|McAfee|SentinelAgent|SentinelOne|CSFalcon|CSAgent|sqlservr|sqlwriter|MsMpEng|MsSense)"), 1, 0) | eval has_shadow_del=if(match(mvjoin(commands,"|"), "(?i)(vssadmin\s+delete\s+shadows|wmic\s+shadowcopy\s+delete|Win32_Shadowcopy|Remove-WmiObject.*Win32_Shadow)"), 1, 0) | eval has_recovery_sabotage=if(match(mvjoin(commands,"|"), "(?i)(bcdedit.*(recoveryenabled\s+No|ignoreallfailures)|wbadmin\s+delete\s+(catalog|systemstatebackup|backup))"), 1, 0) | where has_svc_stop=1 AND has_shadow_del=1 AND has_recovery_sabotage=1 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | table firstTime lastTime dest user proc_names commands parents | sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
// DragonForce / LockBit-Black-derived pre-encryption burst
let Window = 10m;
let Lookback = 7d;
let _excl_accts = dynamic(["system","local service","network service"]);
let svc_stop =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$" and tolower(AccountName) !in (_excl_accts)
    | where (FileName =~ "net.exe" or FileName =~ "net1.exe" or FileName =~ "sc.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has "stop"
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Veeam","MSSQL","SQLAgent","SQLWriter","Backup","Acronis","WinDefend","Sense","Sophos","McAfee","SentinelAgent","SentinelOne","CSFalconService","CSAgent")
         or (FileName =~ "taskkill.exe"
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("veeam","sqlservr","sqlwriter","sqlagent","MsMpEng","MsSense","windefend","sophos","SentinelAgent","CSFalcon","mcshield"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
             and ProcessCommandLine has "Stop-Service"
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Veeam","SQL","Backup","Sense","WinDefend","Sophos","Sentinel"))
    | project SvcTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SvcStopProc = FileName, SvcStopCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              SvcStopParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
let shadow_del =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Get-CimInstance Win32_Shadow"))
    | project ShadowTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, ShadowCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
let recovery_sabotage =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
             and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No")
                  or ProcessCommandLine has "ignoreallfailures"))
         or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete"
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("catalog","systemstatebackup","backup"))
    | project RecoveryTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RecoveryCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
svc_stop
| join kind=inner shadow_del on DeviceId
| where ShadowTime between (SvcTime - Window .. SvcTime + Window)
| join kind=inner recovery_sabotage on DeviceId
| where RecoveryTime between (SvcTime - Window .. SvcTime + Window)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(SvcTime), LastSeen = max(RecoveryTime),
            SvcStopCmds = make_set(SvcStopCmd, 20),
            ShadowCmds = make_set(ShadowCmd, 10),
            RecoveryCmds = make_set(RecoveryCmd, 10),
            Accounts = make_set(AccountName, 10),
            Parents = make_set(SvcStopParent, 10)
            by DeviceId, DeviceName
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// DragonForce / LockBit-Black-derived pre-encryption burst — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
let Window = 10m;
let Lookback = 7d;
let proc =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where AccountType == "User"
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where SubjectUserName !in~ ("SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE");
let svc_stop =
    proc
    | where (NewProcessName endswith @"\net.exe" or NewProcessName endswith @"\net1.exe" or NewProcessName endswith @"\sc.exe")
            and CommandLine has "stop"
            and CommandLine has_any ("Veeam","MSSQL","SQLAgent","SQLWriter","Backup","Acronis","WinDefend","Sense","Sophos","McAfee","SentinelAgent","SentinelOne","CSFalconService","CSAgent")
         or (NewProcessName endswith @"\taskkill.exe"
             and CommandLine has_any ("veeam","sqlservr","sqlwriter","sqlagent","MsMpEng","MsSense","windefend","sophos","SentinelAgent","CSFalcon","mcshield"))
         or ((NewProcessName endswith @"\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith @"\pwsh.exe")
             and CommandLine has "Stop-Service"
             and CommandLine has_any ("Veeam","SQL","Backup","Sense","WinDefend","Sophos","Sentinel"))
    | project SvcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, SvcStopProc = NewProcessName, SvcStopCmd = CommandLine, SvcStopParent = ParentProcessName;
let shadow_del =
    proc
    | where (NewProcessName endswith @"\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith @"\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or ((NewProcessName endswith @"\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith @"\pwsh.exe")
             and CommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Get-CimInstance Win32_Shadow"))
    | project ShadowTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, ShadowCmd = CommandLine;
let recovery_sabotage =
    proc
    | where (NewProcessName endswith @"\bcdedit.exe"
             and (CommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No") or CommandLine has "ignoreallfailures"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith @"\wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete"
             and CommandLine has_any ("catalog","systemstatebackup","backup"))
    | project RecoveryTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, RecoveryCmd = CommandLine;
svc_stop
| join kind=inner shadow_del on Computer
| where ShadowTime between (SvcTime - Window .. SvcTime + Window)
| join kind=inner recovery_sabotage on Computer
| where RecoveryTime between (SvcTime - Window .. SvcTime + Window)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(SvcTime), LastSeen = max(RecoveryTime),
            SvcStopCmds = make_set(SvcStopCmd, 20),
            ShadowCmds = make_set(ShadowCmd, 10),
            RecoveryCmds = make_set(RecoveryCmd, 10),
            Accounts = make_set(Account, 10),
            Parents = make_set(SvcStopParent, 10)
            by Computer
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: The triple co-occurrence (service-kill burst targeting the DragonForce hard-coded list + shadow-copy deletion + recovery sabotage) within 10 minutes on a single host is essentially the fingerprint of a LockBit-Black / Conti-V3 family encryptor's pre-encryption thread. Group-IB's reverse-engineering of the DragonForce builder and SOCRadar's affiliate write-ups confirm this exact ordering and the sa

ucs.title: [LLM] Scattered Spider → DragonForce affiliate: helpdesk-driven MFA/credential reset followed by first-seen-geo sign-in within 60 minutes
ucs.description: Detects the documented Scattered Spider (UNC3944 / Octo Tempest / Storm-0875 / Muddled Libra) initial-access pattern used in the April-May 2025 DragonForce deployments against UK retail (M&S, Co-op, Harrods). The actor social-engineers the IT helpdesk to reset a target user's password or re-register an authenticator, then immediately authenticates from infrastructure (residential proxy, VPS) never previously seen for that account. Correlates an Entra ID authentication-method/password reset against a successful sign-in from a (UserPrincipalName, IPAddress) pair absent from the trailing 30-day b
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS reset_time values(Auditing_Changes.command) AS reset_op values(Auditing_Changes.src_user) AS admin_user values(Auditing_Changes.src) AS admin_ip FROM datamodel=Change.Auditing_Changes WHERE Auditing_Changes.object_category="user" AND Auditing_Changes.action="modified" AND (Auditing_Changes.command="*Reset user password*" OR Auditing_Changes.command="*Reset user authentication method*" OR Auditing_Changes.command="*User registered security info*" OR Auditing_Changes.command="*Admin registered security info*" OR Auditing_Changes.command="*Disable Strong Authentication*" OR Auditing_Changes.command="*Update user*") BY Auditing_Changes.dest_user _time span=1h | rename Auditing_Changes.dest_user AS target_user | join type=inner target_user [ | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS signin_time values(Authentication.src) AS signin_ip values(Authentication.app) AS app values(Authentication.src_user_category) AS country FROM datamodel=Authentication.Authentication WHERE Authentication.action="success" AND Authentication.authentication_method!="certificate" BY Authentication.user _time span=5m | rename Authentication.user AS target_user ] | where signin_time >= reset_time AND signin_time <= (reset_time + 3600) | join type=left signin_ip target_user [ search index=* sourcetype="azure:aad:signin" earliest=-30d@d latest=-1h ResultType=0 | stats values(IPAddress) AS baseline_ips by UserPrincipalName | rename UserPrincipalName AS target_user IPAddress AS signin_ip | eval is_baseline_ip=1 ] | where isnull(is_baseline_ip) | convert ctime(reset_time) ctime(signin_time) | table reset_time reset_op admin_user admin_ip target_user signin_time signin_ip app country | sort - signin_time
ucs.kql:
// Scattered Spider → DragonForce: helpdesk-driven credential reset → first-seen-geo sign-in
let ResetWindow = 60m;
let BaselineDays = 30d;
let HotLookback = 7d;
let resets =
    IdentityDirectoryEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(HotLookback)
    | where Application == "Azure AD"
    | where ActionType in~ ("Forced password reset","Account password changed","Reset user password","User registered security info","Admin registered security info","Reset user authentication method","Disable Strong Authentication","Update user")
    | where isnotempty(TargetAccountUpn)
    | project ResetTime = Timestamp, ResetOp = ActionType,
              TargetUpn = tolower(TargetAccountUpn),
              AdminUpn = tolower(AccountUpn), AdminIP = IPAddress;
let baseline_pairs =
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp between (ago(BaselineDays) .. ago(ResetWindow))
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | summarize by AccountUpn = tolower(AccountUpn), IPAddress;
AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(HotLookback)
| where ErrorCode == 0
| where isnotempty(AccountUpn) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
| extend AccountUpn = tolower(AccountUpn)
| join kind=inner resets on $left.AccountUpn == $right.TargetUpn
| where Timestamp between (ResetTime .. ResetTime + ResetWindow)
| join kind=leftanti baseline_pairs on AccountUpn, IPAddress
| project SignInTime = Timestamp, AccountUpn, IPAddress, Country, City,
          Application, AppDisplayName, UserAgent, IsAnonymousProxy,
          RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ConditionalAccessStatus,
          ResetTime, ResetOp, AdminUpn, AdminIP,
          DelayMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, ResetTime)
| order by SignInTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Scattered Spider → DragonForce: helpdesk credential/MFA reset → first-seen-geo sign-in
let ResetWindow = 60m;
let BaselineDays = 30d;
let HotLookback = 7d;
let resets =
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(HotLookback)
    | where OperationName in~ ("Reset user password","Reset password (by admin)","User registered security info","Admin registered security info","Reset user authentication method","Disable Strong Authentication","Update user","Delete user authentication method","User started security info registration")
    | where Result =~ "success"
    | mv-expand TargetResources
    | extend TargetUpn = tolower(tostring(TargetResources.userPrincipalName))
    | extend AdminUpn = tolower(tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName))
    | extend AdminIP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.ipAddress)
    | where isnotempty(TargetUpn)
    | project ResetTime = TimeGenerated, ResetOp = OperationName, TargetUpn, AdminUpn, AdminIP;
let baseline_pairs =
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(BaselineDays) .. ago(ResetWindow))
    | where ResultType == 0
    | summarize by UserPrincipalName = tolower(UserPrincipalName), IPAddress;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(HotLookback)
| where ResultType == 0
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
| extend UserPrincipalName = tolower(UserPrincipalName)
| extend Country = tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).countryOrRegion),
         City = tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).city)
| join kind=inner resets on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.TargetUpn
| where TimeGenerated between (ResetTime .. ResetTime + ResetWindow)
| join kind=leftanti baseline_pairs on UserPrincipalName, IPAddress
| project SignInTime = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Country, City,
          AppDisplayName, UserAgent, ClientAppUsed,
          RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ConditionalAccessStatus,
          ResetTime, ResetOp, AdminUpn, AdminIP,
          DelayMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, ResetTime)
| order by SignInTime desc
ucs.rationale: Scattered Spider (UNC3944 / Octo Tempest / Muddled Libra / Storm-0875) is the well-documented affiliate cluster that handed off victim networks to DragonForce in the 2025 UK retail wave after pivoting from BlackCat/ALPHV. Their canonical entry pattern is helpdesk social engineering to drive a credential or authenticator reset on a chosen identity, then immediate sign-in from infrastructure absent
